videos.title: Bhanupali Beri Railway Project latest Work Update Near Bilaspur Himachal Pradesh
videos.description: The Bhanupli–Leh line is an under-construction electrified railway track connecting Bhanupli, Punjab, to Leh, Ladakh.

methodology: YouTube Data API v3 search for the project name (India region). Top 3 videos by relevance; top 20 comments per video.
